name: webhook-sender
title: Webhook Sender
description: Send HTTP webhooks instantly — with key-value or raw JSON body, automatic history, saved presets, and rich response inspection.
author: BinaryBlitz10

commands.name: index
commands.title: Send Webhook
commands.subtitle: Webhook Sender
commands.description: Send webhooks, view history, and manage saved webhooks

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
